introSection: Cat-O-Pillar, previously known as Stinger, is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Stinger opened in 2000, replacing Runaway Train. It was renamed to Cat-O-Pillar in 2015.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Cat-O-Pillar has a figure 8 layout, this figure 8 is surrounded by an oval, this being the station, lift hill and final brakes.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: It opened with red track and green supports, the track was later repainted green when it changed to the Cat-O-Pillar in 2015.

fullText:
Cat-O-Pillar, previously known as Stinger, is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

Stinger opened in 2000, replacing Runaway Train. It was renamed to Cat-O-Pillar in 2015.

Cat-O-Pillar has a figure 8 layout, this figure 8 is surrounded by an oval, this being the station, lift hill and final brakes.

It opened with red track and green supports, the track was later repainted green when it changed to the Cat-O-Pillar in 2015.
